name: extend-chat-domain
description: Extend chatDomain to support feature session linking. Add featureSessionId field to ChatSession and new enhancements for querying and creating feature-linked chats.
acceptanceCriteria: ChatDomain ArkType scope includes 'featureSessionId?': 'string' on ChatSession entity
enhancements.models adds ChatSession.featureSessionId view (returns the linked ID or undefined)
enhancements.collections adds ChatSessionCollection.findByFeatureSession(featureSessionId) returning all chat sessions for a feature
enhancements.rootStore adds createFeatureChat(featureSessionId, name) action that creates a ChatSession linked to a FeatureSession
Existing chatDomain functionality (createChatSession, addMessage, recordArtifact) remains unchanged
Unit tests verify findByFeatureSession returns correct sessions
Unit tests verify createFeatureChat links session correctly
